pr.title: Non-record: Random Linear Maps + Learned Adapters (val_bpb=1.93 (1.607 outside 10mins), 2.4MB artifact (1.9mb outside 10mins)

output.summary: Learns rank-16 adapters atop seeded random linear maps so only the adapters are stored while Muon+AdamW trains a tiny 5-layer transformer under 16MB.
techniques: Seeded random base weights regenerated at load time
Rank-16 adapters learn corrections to fixed projections
Muon+AdamW optimization on the adapter-only transformer
